events.desc: A great scientist emerges in Selurian Republic: Chieftain Turakina.
Famine strikes Stormbreak Cliffs, devastating Selurian Republic.
A great scientist emerges in Northern Sapphire Coast: King Treatisa.
Selurian Republic loses the knowledge of the information era, falling back to industrial
Selurian Republic advances to the information era
A succession crisis erupts in Northern Sapphire Coast after the death of Tribune Ironpeak.
The succession crisis in Northern Sapphire Coast ends: High Priestess Laurelei rises to power after the fall of Consul Ergunis.
A great scientist emerges in Selurian Republic: Chieftain Windlass.
Chieftain Turakina of Selurian Republic becomes a folk hero after a dramatic disaster.
A great scientist emerges in Northern Sapphire Coast: Sovereign Riptide.
The Secession of Lower Northern Sapphire Coast from Northern Sapphire Coast
Lower Northern Sapphire Coast produces a cultural masterwork
